name: Mother's Chocolate Diamonds (Christmas)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease a 9x13-inch baking pan with butter or oil.
3. Melt the butter and chocolate together in a saucepan over low heat, stirring until smooth.
4. Add sugar to the melted mixture and stir until well combined.
5. Beat in eggs one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
6. Stir in vanilla extract.
7. Gradually add flour and chopped pecans, mixing until all ingredients are incorporated.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared baking pan and spread evenly.
9. Bake for 15 minutes or until set.
10. Allow to cool completely in the pan before cutting into diamond-shaped pieces.
11. Store the diamonds in a tin box, separating each layer with wax paper.
